hero.title:
Reliable methods
for sustainable production
hero.description: IMMEIT specializes in maintenance methods and industrial performance, multi-technical maintenance and air conditioning system installation. Based in Senegal Dakar and France Paris, we design tailor-made solutions to guarantee the performance, reliability and longevity of your equipment.

about.title: Expert in methods maintenance & industrial performance
about.p1: IMMEIT is a company specializing in maintenance methods, industrial performance, equipment reliability, digitalization of maintenance processes, multi-technical maintenance and air conditioning.
about.p2: We support industrial and tertiary companies in optimizing their performance through tailored solutions aimed at improving availability, reliability, safety and productivity of their facilities.
about.p3: Founded in 2024 by Yelli NIANG, IMMEIT leverages expertise developed within major industrial groups such as Renault Group, Stellantis, Safran, SNCF, Keolis, Air Liquide, SUEZ and ICM Ingénierie, where its founder held positions as methods engineer then manager of methods and industrial performance.
about.address:
Head office :
Cité Safco Niacoulrab, Villa N°40
11515 Keur Massar, Dakar – Senegal
about.p4: IMMEIT: Your partner in maintenance, reliability and industrial performance.

methodo.title: A structured approach in 5 steps
methodo.subtitle: We design and deploy optimized maintenance models, ensuring a sustainable balance between performance, reliability and cost control.
methodo.step1.title: Analyze
methodo.step1.desc: Criticality analysis and asset prioritization to identify priority equipment and areas for improvement.
methodo.step2.title: Strategy
methodo.step2.desc: Definition of maintenance strategies adapted to the specific challenges of each installation and process.
methodo.step3.title: Optimize
methodo.step3.desc: Optimization of intervention plans and standards to maximize availability and reduce operational costs.
methodo.step4.title: Structure
methodo.step4.desc: Structuring of technical data and deployment of CMMS tools for centralized and reliable management.
methodo.step5.title: Monitor
methodo.step5.desc: Monitoring through clear indicators and continuous improvement to guarantee long-term performance.
methodo.objective: Objective: Sustainable operational performance, equipment reliability and cost control
piliers.title: Our 9 support pillars
piliers.p1.title: 1. Analysis & Diagnosis
piliers.p1.desc: Asset mapping, criticality analysis and complete equipment performance diagnosis.
piliers.p2.title: 2. Organization & Processes
piliers.p2.desc: Structuring of teams, working methods and processes for effective maintenance.
piliers.p3.title: 3. Optimized Maintenance Policy
piliers.p3.desc: Implementation of preventive, conditional and predictive maintenance to reduce breakdowns.
piliers.p4.title: 4. Installation Reliability
piliers.p4.desc: Application of FMECA and RCM methods to improve the reliability and availability of installations.
piliers.p5.title: 5. Digitalization & CMMS
piliers.p5.desc: Use of CMMS and digital tools to leverage data and manage interventions.
piliers.p6.title: 6. Maintenance Master Plan
piliers.p6.desc: Definition of a maintenance strategy aligned with industrial and financial objectives.
piliers.p7.title: 7. Strategic Spare Parts Management
piliers.p7.desc: Optimization of spare parts management and control of critical stock.
piliers.p8.title: 8. Spare Parts & Critical Stock Control
piliers.p8.desc: Monitoring of key indicators: MTBF, MTTR, equipment availability and maintenance costs.
piliers.p9.title: 9. Project Management & Investments
piliers.p9.desc: Securing industrial investments and efficient management of CAPEX / OPEX projects.
engagement.title: A collaboration built on trust
engagement.card1.title: Competitive pricing
engagement.card1.desc: Quality services at fair prices, with excellent value for money and clear quotes with no surprises.
engagement.card2.title: Total transparency
engagement.card2.desc: Contracts and quotes with no hidden costs. You know exactly what you pay, with complete confidence.
engagement.card3.title: Responsiveness
engagement.card3.desc: Quick actions on your contracts and quotes to guarantee an optimal customer experience and met deadlines.
engagement.card4.title: Rigorous follow-up

cta.title: Craving performance?
cta.desc: Contact us today for a free and personalized quote. Present in Senegal and France.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Industrial, tertiary and residential. We work with major accounts (Renault, Stellantis, SAFRAN, SUEZ) as well as SMEs and individuals for air conditioning.
faq.q2: Do you only operate in Senegal?
faq.a2: No. We are present in Senegal (head office in Keur Massar), France (Paris) and also operate in Mali and Ivory Coast.
faq.a3: Yes, we offer tailored preventive and corrective maintenance contracts, with rigorous follow-up and monthly performance reports.
faq.q4: Which CMMS software do you master?
faq.a4: Coswin, SAP, Maximo, CARL, DIMOMAINT — we support our clients in the deployment, configuration and optimization of their CMMS tools.
testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.t1.text: "Thank you for the quality of the work carried out in managing maintenance reports and updating KPIs. The rigor, responsiveness and professionalism provided effectively contribute to monitoring our activities and performance. The availability and quality of remote work are also highly appreciated."
testimonials.t1.author: Maintenance Manager
testimonials.t2.text: Our collaboration on the management and control of our maintenance reports has optimized our operating mode. It has also helped to upskill our employees, ensuring better operational management. Furthermore, the added value brought to the evolution of our tracking files as well as the various functional analyses has saved us time in processing data useful for our deliverables.
testimonials.t2.author: Operational Manager France
testimonials.t3.text: "Thanks to this partnership, it has been possible to respond to tenders while reducing service costs, allowing us to position ourselves competitively. Despite the distance, the responsiveness, listening skills and professionalism greatly facilitate the partnership as well as collaboration with on-site teams. I hope our partnership will continue long-term."
testimonials.t3.author: Activities Manager

mm.meta.title: Maintenance Methods & Performance - IMMEIT
mm.hero.title: Maintenance Methods & Industrial Performance
mm.hero.p1: In increasingly demanding industrial and tertiary environments, cost control, equipment availability and continuous performance improvement are major challenges. IMMEIT supports companies in implementing structured and efficient maintenance methods to guarantee installation reliability, optimize resources and sustainably improve productivity.
mm.hero.p2: Thanks to our expertise in maintenance methods, equipment reliability and industrial performance, we design and deploy tailored solutions for your operational and strategic challenges.
mm.hero.p3: Our ambition is to make maintenance a true performance lever, contributing to the reduction of unplanned downtime, control of operating costs, improvement of equipment availability and strengthening of your organization's competitiveness.
mm.services.title: Our services
mm.services.subtitle: Complete solutions for the maintenance of your industrial and tertiary equipment.
mm.card1.title: Audit & Performance Improvement
mm.card1.l1: Reliability study of your technical equipment and proposal of action plans.
mm.card1.l2: Analysis and improvement of your installation performance.
mm.card1.l3: Quality audit of your maintenance processes and proposal of action plans.
mm.card2.title: Preventive Maintenance & Strategy
mm.card2.l1: Setup of your preventive and regulatory maintenance schedules.
mm.card2.l2: Drafting and updating of your preventive and regulatory maintenance plans.
mm.card2.l3: Drafting and updating of your preventive maintenance procedures.
mm.card2.l4: Study of your maintenance policy and strategy.
mm.card2.l5: FMECA analysis of your technical installations and spare parts.
mm.card3.title: Indicators & maintenance monitoring
mm.card3.l1: Setup and monitoring of key performance indicators (KPIs).
mm.card3.l2: Definition and implementation of key performance indicators.
mm.card3.l4: Monthly reporting of key performance indicators.
mm.card3.l5: Preparation of monthly, bimonthly and annual reports.
mm.card4.title: CMMS & Data Management
mm.card4.l1: Analysis of your CMMS data and proposal of action plans.
mm.card4.l2: Support in setting up your CMMS.
mm.card4.l3: Creation and updating of equipment structures in the CMMS.
mm.card4.l4: Creation and updating of interventions in the CMMS.
mm.card4.l5: Audit of CMMS work orders (archived or not).
mm.card4.l6: Data processing and analysis using Excel.
mm.card5.title: Technical & Document Management
mm.card5.l1: Management and updating of your technical documents.
mm.card5.l3: Management and treatment of obsolescence of your equipment and parts.
mm.card5.l4: Management of your spare parts inventory.
mm.card5.l5: Definition of strategic parts for your industrial and tertiary installations.
mm.card6.title: Organization & documentation
mm.card6.l1: Drafting of your industrial and tertiary maintenance processes.
mm.card6.l3: Support in drafting your maintenance tenders.
mm.card6.l4: Support in drafting specifications during tenders.
mm.card7.title: Quality & HSE
mm.card7.l1: Creation and updating of your unique documents.
mm.card7.l2: Drafting and updating of maintenance and HSE audit grids.
mm.card7.l7: Control of administrative documents of contractors.
mm.card7.l8: Verification of risk analyses of maintenance providers (according to client site).
mm.card8.title: Training & Project Management
mm.card8.l5: Remote monitoring of IMC projects type D or E.
mm.card8.l6: On-site management and monitoring of your industrial and tertiary ICM projects type A, B and C.
mm.tools.title: Our tools
mm.tools.subtitle: To guarantee effective interventions and optimal management of maintenance activities, IMMEIT relies on proven methods and powerful tools to structure, manage and sustainably improve operations.
mm.tools.heading: Our main tools and solutions
mm.tools.conclusion: Our approach is based on the combination of rigorous methods, powerful digital tools and field expertise to sustainably improve the reliability, safety and performance of our clients' installations.
mm.closing: Trust IMMEIT to optimize your maintenance activities, improve the availability of your equipment and sustainably strengthen your company's performance. Together, let's build solutions adapted to your industrial and tertiary challenges.

mmt.meta.title: Multi-technical Maintenance - IMMEIT
mmt.meta.description: IMMEIT - Industrial and tertiary multi-technical maintenance
mmt.hero.title: Multi-technical Maintenance
mmt.hero.p0: Industrial and tertiary maintenance: guaranteeing the availability and performance of your installations
mmt.hero.p1: IMMEIT supports industrial companies, tertiary building managers and local authorities in the maintenance and operation of their technical equipment. Our objective is to ensure business continuity, reduce unplanned downtime and optimize the lifespan of your installations.
mmt.services.title: Our services
mmt.services.subtitle: Complete solutions for the maintenance of your industrial and tertiary equipment.
mmt.card1.title: Preventive Maintenance
mmt.card1.l1: Development and execution of maintenance plans.
mmt.card1.l4: Monitoring of performance indicators and improvement recommendations.
mmt.card2.title: Corrective Maintenance
mmt.card2.l2: Quick troubleshooting and restoration of installations.
mmt.card2.l3: Repair or replacement of defective components.
mmt.card2.l4: Root cause analysis to prevent recurrence of failures.
mmt.card3.title: Technical Shutdowns
mmt.card3.l1: Preparation and planning of scheduled shutdowns.
mmt.card3.l2: Coordination of contractors and work management.
mmt.card3.l4: Control and validation of installation restart.
mmt.card4.title: Metrology, Machine Inspection & Regulatory Maintenance
mmt.card4.l1: Inspection of equipment and infrastructure condition.
mmt.card4.l2: Verification and calibration of measuring instruments.
mmt.domains.title: Our areas of intervention
mmt.domains.l3: Air conditioning, ventilation and heating systems (HVAC).
mmt.domains.l5: Tertiary buildings, logistics platforms and industrial sites.
